ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "trading_day" INTEGER /* Whether the stock traded on this day */,
  "market_open" TEXT /* Opening time of the market */,
  "market_close" TEXT /* Closing time of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Market sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_level FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_level") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription level */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription level */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features included in the subscription level */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription level */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial period in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the API was accessed */,
  "api_quota" INTEGER /* Quota of API calls allowed per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the query */,
  "query_details" TEXT /* Details of the data query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was made */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to execute the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the risk assessment is made */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was made */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the stock (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the risk assessment */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the risk occurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
